findings.description: Class name `CustomTagConfig` (used in the XML configuration code example as `nablarch.common.web.tag.CustomTagConfig`) is not listed in s7 hints. The class appears directly in the configuration XML block in s7 and is referenced throughout as the primary configuration point for display control.
findings.source_evidence: Source XML: `<component name="customTagConfig" class="nablarch.common.web.tag.CustomTagConfig">` and multiple references to `:ref:`WebView_CustomTagConfig``
